title: Adalimumab Injection: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:

What other information should I know? 
Keep all appointments with your doctor and the laboratory. Your doctor will order certain lab tests before, during, and after your treatment to check your body's response to adalimumab injection.
Do not let anyone else use your medication. Ask your pharmacist any questions you have about refilling your prescription.
Keep a written list of all of the prescription and nonprescription (over-the-counter) medicines 
vitamins, minerals, and dietary supplements you are taking. Bring this list with you each time 
you visit a doctor or if you are admitted to the hospital. You should carry the list with you in 
case of emergencies.
